nodes.itemHTML: • Ethereum Development with Gostars795 - A little e-book on Ethereum Development with Go.

• go-tgbotstars106 - Pure Golang Telegram Bot API wrapper, generated from swagger file, session-based router and middleware.

• errorxstars743 - A feature rich error package with stack traces, composition of errors and more.

• clockwerkstars105 - Go package to schedule periodic jobs using a simple, fluent syntax.
• clockworkstars28 - Simple and intuitive job scheduling library in Go.

• go-cronstars201 - Simple Cron library for go that can execute closures or functions at varying intervals, from once a second to once a year on a specific date and time. Primarily for web applications and long running daemons.
• gronstars853 - Define time-based tasks using a simple Go API and Gron’s scheduler will run them accordingly.
• JobRunnerstars849 - Smart and featureful cron job scheduler with job queuing and live monitoring built in.

• JayDiffstars84 - JSON diff utility written in Go.
• JSON-to-Go - Convert JSON to Go struct.
• jsonapi-errorsstars9 - Go bindings based on the JSON API errors reference.
• jsonfstars61 - Console tool for highlighted formatting and struct query fetching JSON.
• jsongostars96 - Fluent API to make it easier to create Json objects.
• jsonhalstars9 - Simple Go package to make custom structs marshal into HAL compatible JSON responses.
• kazaamstars187 - API for arbitrary transformation of JSON documents.

• xlsxstars4.9k - Library to simplify reading the XML format used by recent version of Microsoft Excel in Go programs.
• xlsxstars134 - Fast and safe way to read/update your existing Microsoft Excel files in Go programs.
• wirestars32 - Strict Runtime Dependency Injection for Golang.

• xstringsstars895 - Collection of useful string functions ported from other languages.
• goidstars30 - Generate and Parse RFC4122 compliant V4 UUIDs.
• uuidstars12 - Generate, encode, and decode UUIDs v1 with fast or cryptographic-quality random node identifier.
• uuidstars911 - Implementation of Universally Unique Identifier (UUID). Supports both creation and parsing of UUIDs. Actively maintained fork of satori uuid.
• wuidstars411 - An extremely fast unique number generator, 10-135 times faster than UUID.
